特性.効果: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent’s Active Pokémon. If you do, discard this Pokémon.

カードの効果.発動効果: Attach a [Fire] Energy from your discard pile to your Active [Fire] Pokémon.
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.
